description: Crafted from soft cotton/lycra fabric, this medium coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with soft double layered cups that minimise show through and ensure a smooth look. An additional moon shaped panel gives extra support to the sides while the cut offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for tight fitting tees and tops. Made of breathable stretch cotton/lycra fabric for enhanced comfort Soft double layered cups that minimise show through and gives extra support to the sides for perfect shaping Beautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretch Printed label for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Hand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or iron Drip dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
